ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin (Agenda) Chrome-credential harvest via GPO logon script
ucs.description: Hunts Qilin's signature pre-encryption credential-theft tradecraft documented by Sophos X-Ops (Aug 2024): the affiliate pushes an `IPScanner.ps1`-style PowerShell script through a domain GPO logon script that reads every Chrome user's `Login Data` SQLite DB and `Local State` master key. Detecting GPO-spawned processes touching Chrome credential stores catches the domain-wide harvest before the Agenda payload runs.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.parent_process) as parentcmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe") AND (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("gpscript.exe","userinit.exe","services.exe") OR Processes.parent_process="*\\SYSVOL\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\SYSVOL\\*\\Policies\\*") AND (Processes.process="*Login Data*" OR Processes.process="*Google\\Chrome\\User Data*" OR Processes.process="*Local State*" OR Processes.process="*\\Cookies*" OR Processes.process="*IPScanner*") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | stats dc(host) as host_count values(host) as hosts min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(cmdline) as cmdline values(parent_process_name) as parent by user process_name | where host_count >= 3 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Qilin/Agenda — GPO logon script harvesting Chrome credentials
// Sophos X-Ops referenced PS script `IPScanner.ps1` deployed via domain policy
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let ChromeCredArtifacts = dynamic([
    @"Google\Chrome\User Data",
    "Login Data",
    "Local State",
    @"\Cookies",
    "IPScanner"
]);
let GpoOrLogonParents = dynamic(["gpscript.exe","userinit.exe","services.exe","winlogon.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"            // skip machine accounts
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (GpoOrLogonParents)
      or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has @"\SYSVOL\"
      or ProcessCommandLine has @"\SYSVOL\"
      or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("\\Policies\\{")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (ChromeCredArtifacts)
      or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(copy-item|sqlite|reflection\.assembly|\[system\.io\.file\]::readallbytes).{0,80}(login\s*data|local\s*state|user\s*data)"
| extend Decoded = iff(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-EC "),
                       base64_decode_tostring(extract(@"(?i)(?:-(?:e(?:nc(?:odedcommand)?)?))\s+([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,})", 1, ProcessCommandLine)),
                       "")
| summarize HostCount = dcount(DeviceId), Hosts = make_set(DeviceName, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            SampleCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine), SampleDecoded = any(Decoded)
            by AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName
| where HostCount >= 3                       // mass deployment = GPO scope
| order by HostCount desc, FirstSeen asc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin/Agenda — GPO logon script harvesting Chrome credentials (Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688)
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let ChromeCredArtifacts = dynamic([
    @"Google\Chrome\User Data",
    "Login Data",
    "Local State",
    @"\Cookies",
    "IPScanner"
]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName endswith @"\powershell.exe"
      or NewProcessName endswith @"\pwsh.exe"
      or NewProcessName endswith @"\cmd.exe"
      or NewProcessName endswith @"\cscript.exe"
      or NewProcessName endswith @"\wscript.exe"
| where ParentProcessName has_any (@"\gpscript.exe", @"\userinit.exe", @"\services.exe", @"\winlogon.exe")
      or CommandLine has @"\SYSVOL\"
      or CommandLine has @"\Policies\{"
| where CommandLine has_any (ChromeCredArtifacts)
      or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(copy-item|sqlite|\[system\.io\.file\]::readallbytes).{0,80}(login\s*data|local\s*state|user\s*data)"
| summarize HostCount = dcount(Computer), Hosts = make_set(Computer, 25),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleCmd = any(CommandLine)
            by Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName
| where HostCount >= 3   // domain-wide GPO push, not a single-host accident
| order by HostCount desc, FirstSeen asc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Qilin Agenda Ransomware - Chrome Credential Harvest via GPO Logon Script
id: 7c4a1b2e-9d3f-4b5a-9e2c-2f8c1a4b9e10
status: experimental
description: Detects Qilin/Agenda ransomware affiliate behaviour where a domain GPO logon script invokes PowerShell/cmd to read Chrome credential artefacts (Login Data, Local State) across many hosts. Documented by Sophos X-Ops (Aug 2024).
references:
    - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2024/08/22/qilin-ransomware-caught-stealing-credentials-stored-in-google-chrome/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
    - attack.credential-access
    - attack.t1555.003
    - attack.t1037.001
    - attack.t1059.001
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_image:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '\pwsh.exe'
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\cscript.exe'
            - '\wscript.exe'
    selection_gpo_context:
        - ParentImage|endswith:
            - '\gpscript.exe'
            - '\userinit.exe'
            - '\services.exe'
        - CommandLine|contains:
            - '\SYSVOL\'
            - '\Policies\{'
    selection_chrome_artifacts:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'Google\Chrome\User Data'
            - 'Login Data'
            - 'Local State'
            - '\Cookies'
            - 'IPScanner'
    filter_machine_acct:
        User|endswith: '$'
    condition: selection_image and selection_gpo_context and selection_chrome_artifacts and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate browser-management or credential-migration scripts pushed by IT via GPO (rare, rule expects mass scope)
level: high
ucs.rationale: This is the single most distinctive Qilin behaviour publicly attributed to the group: Sophos's August 2024 incident response on a Qilin intrusion documented an `IPScanner.ps1` PowerShell script staged in a SYSVOL policy folder and executed at user logon via GPO logon-script invocation, reading Chrome's `Login Data` and `Local State` files for every user that signed in. Most ransomware crews dump L

ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin (Agenda) Safe-Mode reboot + shadow-copy destruction pre-encryption chain
ucs.description: Hunts Qilin's documented impact-stage chain: the Agenda binary (or its loader) reconfigures the host to boot into Safe Mode with networking via `bcdedit /set safeboot`, registers the encryptor as a Safe-Mode service, deletes Volume Shadow Copies, and disables boot recovery — all to evade EDR drivers that don't load in Safe Mode. The bcdedit-safeboot + vssadmin/wmic shadow deletion + wbadmin combo on the same host within minutes is a near-unique fingerprint for Qilin/Agenda and a small set of similar Russian-speaking RaaS crews (Snatch, Akira variants).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.user) as user values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("bcdedit.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","wbadmin.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") OR Processes.process_name="net.exe") AND (Processes.process="*safeboot*" OR Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy delete*" OR Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled no*" OR Processes.process="*Win32_Shadowcopy*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name _time span=1s | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | bin _time span=10m | stats dc(process_name) as cmd_variety values(process_name) as commands values(process) as cmdlines values(parent_process_name) as parents min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by host _time | where cmd_variety >= 2 AND ( (mvfind(commands,"bcdedit.exe")>=0 AND (mvfind(commands,"vssadmin.exe")>=0 OR mvfind(commands,"wmic.exe")>=0 OR mvfind(commands,"wbadmin.exe")>=0)) OR (mvfind(cmdlines,"safeboot")>=0) ) | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Qilin/Agenda — Safe-Mode reboot configuration AND shadow-copy/recovery destruction
// on the same host within a 10-minute window
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 10m;
let SafeBoot = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot")
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","no"))
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy" and ProcessCommandLine has "ignoreallfailures")
    | project SafeBootTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SafeBootCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              SafeBootParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
let ShadowKill = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy",
                                              "Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy",
                                              "Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project ShadowTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              ShadowCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              ShadowParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
SafeBoot
| join kind=inner ShadowKill on DeviceId
| where abs(datetime_diff('second', SafeBootTime, ShadowTime)) <= 600    // within ±10 min
| project DeviceName, AccountName,
          SafeBootTime, SafeBootCmd, SafeBootParent,
          ShadowTime, ShadowCmd, ShadowParent,
          DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', ShadowTime, SafeBootTime)
| order by SafeBootTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin/Agenda — Safe-Mode reboot + shadow-copy destruction within 10 min on same host
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let SafeBoot = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith @"\bcdedit.exe"
    | where CommandLine has "safeboot"
         or (CommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","no"))
         or (CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy" and CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures")
    | project SafeBootTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              SafeBootCmd = CommandLine, SafeBootParent = ParentProcessName;
let ShadowKill = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackHours)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith @"\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith @"\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith @"\wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
         or (NewProcessName has_any (@"\powershell.exe", @"\pwsh.exe")
             and CommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy",
                                       "Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy",
                                       "Get-CimInstance Win32_Shadowcopy"))
    | project ShadowTime = TimeGenerated, Computer,
              ShadowCmd = CommandLine, ShadowParent = ParentProcessName;
SafeBoot
| join kind=inner ShadowKill on Computer
| where abs(datetime_diff('second', SafeBootTime, ShadowTime)) <= 600
| project Computer, Account,
          SafeBootTime, SafeBootCmd, SafeBootParent,
          ShadowTime, ShadowCmd, ShadowParent,
          DeltaSec = datetime_diff('second', ShadowTime, SafeBootTime)
| order by SafeBootTime desc
ucs.rationale: Qilin/Agenda's Rust/Go encryptor is documented (Trend Micro, Group-IB, Halcyon reports) to support a `--safeboot` execution mode that reconfigures Windows to boot into Safe Mode with networking, registers itself as a Safe-Mode service, and only then encrypts — sidestepping kernel-mode EDR drivers that don't load in Safe Mode. The behavioural fingerprint is the temporal co-occurrence of `bcdedit /s
